problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to or, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
